name: Zephyr
description:
[NULL] A Dragonite mailman takes refuge in your home during a particularly bad thunderstorm. This Convergent has quite a lot of stories and experiences to tell and is very eager to tell them, confidential or not, as he doesn't get to actually talk to people very often... it seems like he might have quite a lot to get off his chest.

Creator Notes: A very brief description, not really a lot to go over without spoilers, but he's a big sweetheart and I actually really enjoyed making him. I'm slightly regretting opening character descriptions (my special hidden lore!) but oh well, just be warned you will get some Convergence lore spoilers. It's still very brief, and eventually characters belonging to the factions/canon characters will be released, but it might be a long time before that happens.

For people who don't care/are new, don't worry about the lore if you don't care for it. It's plays a very minor role, at least for now

I've also put in a Music Mania thing. I do plan on using some music for future characters, and I wanted to see how well it implements and how well you like it. I used a track from Forsaken. Didn't really enjoy the game that much, but this OST is amazing, and it sort of fits Zephyr, so I put it in. Feedback is appreciated.

The SEU version can be found here

I hope you enjoy. 9925

Update 5-19: Made it a bit more obvious to AI that Zephyr is a Convergent and he comes from the Convergence
creator: NullSeu
